summary: Project created by MDE Control Center from project name and mission.
Created public GitHub repository Northvalley-Intelligence/retail-search.
GEN-001 implemented the local Phase 1 Cranfield/OpenSearch foundation and passed local validation twice; public deployment remains externally blocked.

GEN-002 implemented and verified the public Cranfield export path, documented AWS OpenSearch provider setup, and verified Cloudflare read access without deploying; live public acceptance remains blocked on OpenSearch provisioning and approved deployment.

GEN-003 configured the provided managed OpenSearch-compatible service locally without exposing secrets, loaded cranfield-v0 with 1,400 Cranfield documents, and recorded live baseline metrics; public deployment remains blocked on Cloudflare.
GEN-004 deployed the Retail Search Cloudflare Worker and verified public health, search, explain, latest, and versioned endpoints against the live cranfield-v0 OpenSearch index.
GEN-005 added and deployed the public Retail Search interface with indexed Cranfield data details, sample queries, metadata endpoints, and live search/explain verification.
GEN-006 added and deployed a Search Explain flow diagram backed by a retrievalFlow API contract, then verified it against live Cranfield queries.
GEN-007 added and deployed public evaluation results with aggregate metrics plus representative correct, wrong, and missed examples from the live Cranfield run.
GEN-008 reorganized the public Retail Search site into a phase overview home page and focused Phase 1 subsection pages, then deployed and verified the route structure.
GEN-009 added and deployed official dataset references for Cranfield, BEIR, and Amazon ESCI, with behavior data explicitly marked as source-not-selected.
GEN-010 integrated stable traceability and versioning identifiers across mission, article, search evolution, architecture version, decision ledger, intended tag, and local versioned endpoints.
GEN-011 grouped live Cranfield failures by behavior, rejected a query-rescue candidate, and preserved field-sum as an improved transferability-pending architecture candidate.

Compiled Phase 1 two-part article source material (Part 1 lexical/BM25/evaluation advances, Part 2 embeddings/BGE/LTR advances) into .mde/handoffs/control-center-stream_mreep6je_ab6e2bd9-phase1-article-source.md for the Control Center article stream.

Drafted Phase 1 series articles A-0003 (Part 1: failure-driven BM25 and the lexical ceiling) and A-0004 (Part 2: embeddings earn their place) in docs/articles/, ready for the feroshjacob.github.io publishing handoff.

Opened publish PR for SLAB-RS Part 3 (A-0003) at feroshjacob/feroshjacob.github.io#20 with header image and post-merge LinkedIn promo; A-0004 (Part 4) held for operator edits, publishing later this week.

SLAB-RS Part 3 (A-0003) is live at https://feroshjacob.github.io/posts/2026/07/10/self-learning-agent-based-retail-search-part-3-failure-driven-bm25-and-the-lexical-ceiling with LinkedIn promo published after live-URL verification. A-0004 (Part 4) remains held for operator edits.

SLAB-RS Part 4 (A-0004) is live at https://feroshjacob.github.io/posts/2026/07/10/self-learning-agent-based-retail-search-part-4-when-embeddings-finally-earned-their-place, completing the four-part Phase 1 series at https://feroshjacob.github.io/series/self-learning-agent-based-retail-search/.

Phase 1 - Cranfield Foundation is complete: public baseline and milestone endpoints live, Validation Gate passed twice (VAL-035), and the four-part SLAB-RS article series published. Phase 2 - Transferability with BEIR is now active, starting with planning.

Mission Update 002 (Phase 2: Cross-Domain Validation with BEIR, all public datasets tiered, Superset-Not-Filter scope classification) and Mission Update 003 (articles authored by Ferosh personally only after validated implementation; agents never initiate article or posting work) recorded via control-center stream stream_mrk72yep_804934e1.

GEN-027 completed M-0002.1: dataset-agnostic evaluation harness covering Cranfield plus all fourteen public BEIR datasets; live BM25 baselines reproduce published references (SciFact nDCG@10 0.6906 vs 0.665, NFCorpus 0.3273 vs 0.325); Cranfield migrated with exact parity (baseline 0.2995, refined PRF 0.3260); Validation Gate passed twice (VAL-036).

GEN-028 completed M-0002.2: all 15 public BEIR datasets baselined with BM25 (aggregate nDCG@10 0.4261 on the published ~0.43 average, 13/15 within +/-9%) on a single free-tier OpenSearch instance. FEVER-family ~13% discrepancy documented and accepted (ADL-0005). Lexical technique matrix: coverage-rerank and refined PRF both domain-conditional. Cross-domain failure map produced. 61 tests, VAL-037.
